Flow.description: Enables the Grant recipient to create or edit a funding transaction on the GR Portal. If no reconciliation record exists, it assigns a proposed status and creates a funding reconciliation record.
Flow.label: GMS - Funding Transaction Form

fields.name: Confirmation_Screen_Text_Single
fields.fieldText:
Transaction Record {!Get_New_Transaction_Record.Name} has been created


Press Create More Transactions to create another transaction or Complete to return to the Transaction screen

fields.name: Confirmation_Screen_Text_Bulk
fields.fieldText:
{!var_Transaction_Loaded_Count} Transaction Records have been created


Press Create More Transactions to create more transactions or Complete to return to the Transaction screen

fields.name: Transaction_Title
fields.helpText: Short summary of the transaction details (255 Characters or or Less)

fields.name: Invoice_Number_Reference
fields.helpText: Reference that identifies transaction on supporting documentation

fields.name: Query_Details
fields.fieldText: Query Details (Please add your response to the end of the text)

fields.name: Is_the_Supplier_registered_with_Trustmark
fields.fieldText: Is the Supplier registered with Trustmark

fields.name: Reconciliation_Error_Text
fields.fieldText: No Reconciliation record found. Please contact your PSO.

value.stringValue: Transactions outside the reporting period (will not be loaded)

fields.name: Update_Confirmation_Screen_Text
fields.fieldText:
Transaction Record {!rcd_Transaction.Name} has been updated


Press Complete to return to the Transaction screen
